metadata.description: CodeForge plugin marketplace for development tools

plugins.name: codeforge-lsp
plugins.description: LSP servers for CodeForge (Python, TypeScript, Go)

plugins.name: ticket-workflow
plugins.description: EARS-based ticket workflow with GitHub integration

plugins.name: notify-hook
plugins.description: Desktop notifications and audio chime when Claude finishes responding

plugins.name: dangerous-command-blocker
plugins.description: Blocks dangerous bash commands (rm -rf, sudo rm, chmod 777, force push)

plugins.name: protected-files-guard
plugins.description: Blocks modifications to .env, lock files, .git/, and credentials

plugins.name: agent-system
plugins.description: 17 custom agents with built-in agent redirection, CWD injection, and read-only bash enforcement

plugins.name: skill-engine
plugins.description: 21 coding knowledge packs with auto-suggestion for frameworks, tools, and patterns

plugins.name: spec-workflow
plugins.description: Specification lifecycle management: creation, refinement, building, reviewing, updating, and auditing

plugins.name: session-context
plugins.description: Session lifecycle hooks: git state injection, TODO harvesting, and commit reminders

plugins.name: auto-code-quality
plugins.description: Self-contained code quality: auto-format + auto-lint edited files (Ruff/Black, Biome, gofmt, shfmt, dprint, rustfmt, Pyright, ShellCheck, go vet, hadolint, clippy)

plugins.name: workspace-scope-guard
plugins.description: Enforces working directory scope — blocks writes and warns on reads outside the project
